_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "clients" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "balance" TEXT NOT NULL, "country_id" TEXT NULL, "industry_id" TEXT NULL, "size_id" TEXT NULL, "classification" TEXT NULL, "vat_number" TEXT NULL, "group_settings_id" TEXT NULL, "id_number" TEXT NULL, "assigned_user_id" TEXT NULL, "locations" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "products" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NOT NULL, "price" TEXT NOT NULL, "cost" TEXT NOT NULL, "quantity" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outbox" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "mutation_kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "idempotency_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "next_attempt_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "last_error" TEXT NULL, "last_status_code" INTEGER NULL, "field_errors_json" TEXT NULL, "requires_password" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("requires_password" IN (0, 1)), "batch_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "id_remap" ("entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "real_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type", "temp_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sync_state_rows" ("company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_updated_id" TEXT NULL, "last_full_sync_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_delta_sync_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "entity_type"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "statics" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "fetched_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "drafts" ("entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type", "entity_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nav_state" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "current_route" TEXT NULL, "selected_company_id" TEXT NULL, "locale" TEXT NULL, "theme_mode" TEXT NULL, "light_variant" TEXT NULL, "dark_variant" TEXT NULL, "custom_theme_json" TEXT NULL, "filters_json" TEXT NULL, "recent_entities_json" TEXT NULL, "sidebar_collapsed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("sidebar_collapsed" IN (0, 1)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "companies" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NULL, "logo_url" TEXT NULL, "settings" TEXT NOT NULL, "permissions" TEXT NOT NULL, "account_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "token" TEXT NOT NULL, "custom_fields" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "size_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "industry_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "first_month_of_year" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "first_day_of_week" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "use_comma_as_decimal_place" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("use_comma_as_decimal_place" IN (0, 1)), "legal_entity_id" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "has_e_invoice_certificate" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("has_e_invoice_certificate" IN (0, 1)), "e_invoice_certificate_passphrase" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "has_e_invoice_certificate_passphrase" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("has_e_invoice_certificate_passphrase" IN (0, 1)), "enabled_modules" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_admin" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_admin" IN (0, 1)), "is_owner" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_owner" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "enabled_tax_rates" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "enabled_item_tax_rates" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "enabled_expense_tax_rates" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "calculate_taxes" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("calculate_taxes" IN (0, 1)), "tax_data_json" TEXT NULL, "custom_surcharge_taxes1" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("custom_surcharge_taxes1" IN (0, 1)), "custom_surcharge_taxes2" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("custom_surcharge_taxes2" IN (0, 1)), "custom_surcharge_taxes3" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("custom_surcharge_taxes3" IN (0, 1)), "custom_surcharge_taxes4" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("custom_surcharge_taxes4" IN (0, 1)), "track_inventory" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("track_inventory" IN (0, 1)), "stock_notification" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("stock_notification" IN (0, 1)), "inventory_notification_threshold" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "enable_product_discount" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("enable_product_discount" IN (0, 1)), "enable_product_cost" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("enable_product_cost" IN (0, 1)), "enable_product_quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("enable_product_quantity" IN (0, 1)), "default_quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("default_quantity" IN (0, 1)), "show_product_details" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("show_product_details" IN (0, 1)), "fill_products" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("fill_products" IN (0, 1)), "update_products" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("update_products" IN (0, 1)), "convert_products" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("convert_products" IN (0, 1)), "convert_rate_to_client" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("convert_rate_to_client" IN (0, 1)), "stop_on_unpaid_recurring" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("stop_on_unpaid_recurring" IN (0, 1)), "use_quote_terms_on_conversion" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("use_quote_terms_on_conversion" IN (0, 1)), "auto_start_tasks" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("auto_start_tasks" IN (0, 1)), "show_task_end_date" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("show_task_end_date" IN (0, 1)), "show_tasks_table" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("show_tasks_table" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_datelog" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_datelog" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_timelog" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_timelog" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_hours" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_hours" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_item_description" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_item_description" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_project" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_project" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_project_header" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_project_header" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_lock" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_lock" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_task_documents" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_task_documents" IN (0, 1)), "mark_expenses_invoiceable" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("mark_expenses_invoiceable" IN (0, 1)), "mark_expenses_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("mark_expenses_paid" IN (0, 1)), "convert_expense_currency" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("convert_expense_currency" IN (0, 1)), "invoice_expense_documents" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("invoice_expense_documents" IN (0, 1)), "notify_vendor_when_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("notify_vendor_when_paid" IN (0, 1)), "calculate_expense_tax_by_amount" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("calculate_expense_tax_by_amount" IN (0, 1)), "expense_inclusive_taxes" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("expense_inclusive_taxes" IN (0, 1)), "expense_mailbox_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("expense_mailbox_active" IN (0, 1)), "expense_mailbox" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "inbound_mailbox_allow_company_users" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("inbound_mailbox_allow_company_users" IN (0, 1)), "inbound_mailbox_allow_vendors" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("inbound_mailbox_allow_vendors" IN (0, 1)), "inbound_mailbox_allow_clients" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("inbound_mailbox_allow_clients" IN (0, 1)), "inbound_mailbox_whitelist" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "inbound_mailbox_blacklist" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "inbound_mailbox_allow_unknown" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("inbound_mailbox_allow_unknown" IN (0, 1)), "smtp_host" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "smtp_port" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "smtp_encryption" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TLS', "smtp_username" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "smtp_password" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "smtp_local_domain" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "smtp_verify_peer" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("smtp_verify_peer" IN (0, 1)), "google_analytics_key" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "matomo_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "matomo_url" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "session_timeout" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "default_password_timeout" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "oauth_password_required" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("oauth_password_required" IN (0, 1)), "is_disabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_disabled" IN (0, 1)), "markdown_enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("markdown_enabled" IN (0, 1)), "markdown_email_enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("markdown_email_enabled" IN (0, 1)), "report_include_drafts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("report_include_drafts" IN (0, 1)), "report_include_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("report_include_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "quickbooks_json" TEXT NULL, "subdomain" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "portal_domain" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "portal_mode" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "company_key" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "client_registration_fields" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_sync_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "accounts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "plan" TEXT NOT NULL, "num_trial_days" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_hosted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_hosted" IN (0, 1)), "default_company_id" TEXT NULL, "features_json" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "documents" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_path" TEXT NULL, "server_url" TEXT NULL, "mime_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "size" INTEGER NOT NULL, "upload_state" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_settings" ("company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "table_columns_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "extra_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "users" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "first_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NOT NULL, "language_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "signature" TEXT NOT NULL, "permissions" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_owner" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_owner" IN (0, 1)), "is_admin" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_admin" IN (0, 1)), "is_locked" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_locked" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dashboard_cache" ("company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "filter_hash" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "fetched_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "kind", "filter_hash"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "saved_views" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "icon" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "group_settings" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tasks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "task_number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "description" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "rate" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "invoice_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "task_status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_running" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_running" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "task_statuses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "color" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "projects" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "task_rate" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "budgeted_hours" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "current_hours" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "color" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "company_gateways" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "gateway_key" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "label" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "test_mode" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("test_mode" IN (0, 1)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "payment_terms" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "num_days" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tax_rates" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "rate" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "expense_categories" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "color" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "vendors" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL, "id_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "vat_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "city" TEXT NOT NULL, "country_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "currency_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "balance" TEXT NOT NULL, "paid_to_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "expenses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "payment_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "category_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "invoice_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "currency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_paid" IN (0, 1)), "should_be_invoiced" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("should_be_invoiced" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "recurring_expenses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "payment_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "category_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "invoice_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "currency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "should_be_invoiced" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("should_be_invoiced" IN (0, 1)), "frequency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '5', "remaining_cycles" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT -1, "next_send_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "last_sent_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "designs" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_custom" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_custom" IN (0, 1)), "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "is_template" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_template" IN (0, 1)), "is_free" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_free" IN (0, 1)), "entities" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "payment_links" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "price_cents" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "purchase_page" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "group_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "frequency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "schedules" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "template" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "frequency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "next_run" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_paused" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_paused" IN (0, 1)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "invoices" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "partial_due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "balance" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "paid_to_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "partial" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "po_number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "schedule" TEXT NULL, "design_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_locked" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_locked" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "quotes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "balance" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "po_number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "design_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "invoice_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "credits" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "balance" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "paid_to_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "po_number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "design_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "purchase_orders" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "expense_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "balance" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "po_number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "design_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "recurring_invoices" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "due_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "balance" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "po_number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "design_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "assigned_user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "frequency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "next_send_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "remaining_cycles" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "auto_bill" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "bank_accounts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "provider" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "balance" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "currency_code" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "from_date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "auto_sync" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("auto_sync" IN (0, 1)), "disabled_upstream" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("disabled_upstream" IN (0, 1)), "integration_type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "nordigen_institution_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "bank_transactions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "currency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "category" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "base_type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "bank_account_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "description" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "category_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "invoice_ids" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "payment_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "expense_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "transaction_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "transaction_rule_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "participant_name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "participant" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "transaction_rules" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "applies_to" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DEBIT', "matches_on_all" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("matches_on_all" IN (0, 1)), "auto_convert" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("auto_convert" IN (0, 1)), "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "category_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "payments" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "custom_value1" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value2" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value3" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "custom_value4" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "documents" TEXT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "number" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "date" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "amount" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "applied" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "refunded" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', "exchange_rate" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', "status_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "type_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "vendor_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "project_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "company_gateway_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "gateway_type_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "currency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "exchange_currency_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "transaction_reference" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_manual" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_manual" IN (0, 1)), "paymentables" TEXT NULL, "invoices" TEXT NULL, "credits" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "system_logs" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "client_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "event_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "category_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "type_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "log" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "fetched_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "webhooks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "event_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "target_url" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "format" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'JSON', "rest_method" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'POST', PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tokens" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "company_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "temp_id" TEXT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "archived_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "token" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "is_system" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_system" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE (company_id, id));
